prompt: Using the provided reference image of the couscous dish as the hero food photo, transform it into a polished one-page brand identity board for a Moroccan restaurant named {argument name="restaurant name" default="La Casbah"}. Keep the dish itself recognizable, but integrate it as the main visual in the top-right hero area and build a complete premium branding presentation around it on a warm beige editorial layout with refined Moroccan-inspired styling. Add a top-left brand block with the restaurant name as a large serif logotype, a small geometric emblem above it, and the French tagline “SAVEURS D’AILLEURS, SOURIRES D’ICI.” Include a short French brand paragraph and a bold closing sentence beneath. Then create a structured grid brand guide with exactly 9 sections: 1) “LOGO PRINCIPAL” showing the main logo on a light background, 2) “VARIATIONS” with 3 logo variations — one red square version, one green square version, and one circular seal version, 3) “TYPOGRAPHIES” showing 3 text styles — titles, subtitles, and body copy, 4) “PALETTE DE COULEURS” with 6 color swatches labeled Casbah Red, Sahara Sand, Olive Green, Spice Orange, Mint Green, and Charcoal, each with hex codes, 5) “INSPIRATION” with 3 image tiles — Moroccan arch tilework, colorful spices, and fresh mint leaves, 6) “PACKAGING” with 3 mockups — paper takeout bag, food bowl with sleeve, and takeaway coffee cup, 7) “MERCHANDISE” with 3 mockups — apron, tote bag, and cap, 8) “RÉSEAUX SOCIAUX” with 3 social post designs using the food and ingredient imagery plus short French marketing copy, and 9) “VOIX DE LA MARQUE” with 4 brand voice traits and short French descriptions. Add a minimalist quote block on the right reading “BIEN MANGER. SOURIRE. RECOMMENCER.” Finish with a full-width deep red footer band containing the logo centered and subtle Moroccan geometric patterns. Overall look: luxury restaurant branding board, clean agency presentation, cohesive Moroccan visual identity, elegant typography, realistic mockups, soft natural textures, editorial spacing.
translatedPrompt: 以提供的北非小米（couscous）菜肴参考图作为主视觉美食照片，将其转化为名为 {argument name="restaurant name" default="La Casbah"} 的摩洛哥餐厅精美单页品牌项目。在保持菜肴本身可辨识度的前提下，将其作为右上角的主视觉元素，并围绕它在温暖的米色编辑布局上构建完整的优质品牌演示，融入精致的摩洛哥风格设计。在左上角添加品牌板块，以大号衬线字体展示餐厅名称，上方配以小型几何徽标，并附上法语标语“SAVEURS D’AILLEURS, SOURIRES D’ICI。”下方包含一段简短的法语品牌介绍和一句醒目的结语。随后创建一个结构化的品牌指南网格，包含 9 个部分：1) “LOGO PRINCIPAL”：在浅色背景上展示主 Logo；2) “VARIATIONS”：展示 3 种 Logo 变体——红色方形版、绿色方形版和圆形印章版；3) “TYPOGRAPHIES”：展示 3 种字体样式——标题、副标题和正文；4) “PALETTE DE COULEURS”：展示 6 个色块，分别标注为 Casbah Red、Sahara Sand、Olive Green、Spice Orange、Mint Green 和 Charcoal，并附带十六进制颜色代码；5) “INSPIRATION”：展示 3 个图片板块——摩洛哥拱门瓷砖、彩色香料和新鲜薄荷叶；6) “PACKAGING”：展示 3 个样机——纸质外卖袋、带封套的餐碗和外卖咖啡杯；7) “MERCHANDISE”：展示 3 个样机——围裙、托特包和鸭舌帽；8) “RÉSEAUX SOCIAUX”：展示 3 个社交媒体帖子设计，使用美食和食材图片并配以简短的法语营销文案；9) “VOIX DE LA MARQUE”：展示 4 个品牌语调特征及简短的法语描述。在右侧添加一个极简主义的引言框，内容为“BIEN MANGER. SOURIRE. RECOMMENCER。”最后以全宽深红色页脚收尾，居中放置 Logo 并点缀微妙的摩洛哥几何图案。整体外观：奢华餐厅品牌项目、简洁的代理商演示、统一的摩洛哥视觉识别、优雅的排版、逼真的样机、柔和的自然质感、编辑级间距。

breakdown.creativeCore: 摩洛哥餐厅品牌项目：此提示词可将单张美食照片转化为完整的摩洛哥餐厅视觉识别演示，适用于品牌推广、方案演示或代理商风格的样机展示。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 直播带货界面、社交电商、移动端商品页
breakdown.whySelected: 得分 83；构图: centered, grid；风格: realistic, editorial, minimalist, luxury, premium；要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, grid]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, editorial, minimalist, luxury, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
